page_title: Pachinko Winning Guide CR Evangelion 9 SECRET FILE
text:
is a guidebook for CR Evangelion 9 pachinko machine by Guide Works. It was published by Guide Works on 15 December 2023. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4865351752 

Overview

Complementary Confidential Information on CR Evangelion 9. This secret file is packed with information essential to victory in CR Evangelion 9, which has evolved into MAX Battle ST. It provides detailed, easy-to-understand explanations of not only the important normal gameplay effects, but also the uncharted territory of ST. It also includes detailed information on the chance-boosting effects and analytical reliability of each effect.
It also includes premium items, one of the charms of Evangelion!

It also includes an introduction to the story and characters of Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, which is the motif of this work. This is a must-read not only for pachinko fans, but for all Evangelion fans!
